name: AntigravityMobile
desc: A feature-rich mobile dashboard for Antigravity IDE that lets you stream live AI conversations, monitor model quotas, and browse or edit workspace files from a…
descFull: A feature-rich mobile dashboard for Antigravity IDE that lets you stream live AI conversations, monitor model quotas, and browse or edit workspace files from any device on your local network. Includes a distraction-free Lite Mode and optional PIN security.
